name: JD Vance
summary: JD Vance has consistently demonstrated a pattern of behavior that includes making derogatory comments about certain groups, such as childless individuals, immigrants, and women. He has expressed support for policies that would restrict the rights of marginalized communities, including LGBTQ+ individuals and immigrants. Vance has also spread false information, including claims about Haitian migrants eating pets, and has shown a willingness to "create stories" to further his own agenda. Additionally, he has made divisive and inflammatory statements, including telling Kamala Harris to "go to hell" and suggesting that childless individuals are more sociopathic. Vance's actions and statements reveal a character that is divisive, intolerant, and willing to spread misinformation to achieve his goals.

entries.fact: JD Vance complained about 'highly educated transplants' in Silicon Valley in a New York Times op-ed.
JD Vance said elite tech crowds wielded 'political-financial power in combination with a certain condescension'.
Our Ohio Renewal, a nonprofit founded by JD Vance, spent more on 'management services' than on programs to fight opioid abuse in its first year.
Our Ohio Renewal's biggest accomplishment, sending psychiatrist Sally Satel to Ohio's Appalachian region, was 'tainted' by ties between Satel, her employer, and Purdue Pharma.
JD Vance voted against raising the debt ceiling, standing against final passage of the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023
JD Vance introduced legislation that would have made gender-affirming care for minors a federal crime, with penalties of up to 12 years in prison
JD Vance sponsored the Dismantle DEI Act, which would ban federal diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and funding for agencies, contractors, and organizations receiving federal funds
JD Vance said that Kamala Harris 'can go to hell' because 'she wants to yell at Donald Trump because he showed up' at Arlington National Cemetery
JD Vance said 'Don't do this fake outrage thing' in response to criticism of Trump's visit to Arlington National Cemetery
JD Vance said that a vice president 'doesn't really matter' and that Kamala Harris 'has been a bad vice president'
JD Vance stated that Trump had 'said that explicitly that he would' veto a national abortion ban

JD Vance said in a Fox News interview that the country is run by 'a bunch of childless cat ladies who are miserable at their own lives and the choices that they've made and so they want to make the rest of the country miserable too'
JD Vance said in a podcast interview that being childless 'makes people more sociopathic and ultimately our whole country a little bit less, less mentally stable'
JD Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children

JD Vance alleged that Haitian illegal immigrants were 'draining social services and generally causing chaos all over Springfield, Ohio' and that 'reports now show that people have had their pets abducted and eaten by people who shouldn't be in this country'
JD Vance said that 'Big Tech rigged the election' through censorship and that he did not believe Trump lost the 2020 presidential election

JD Vance defended his claims about Haitian migrants eating cats, saying that he was willing 'to create stories so that the American media actually pays attention ... we're creating a story, meaning we're creating the American media focusing on it'

JD Vance objected to fact-checking during the vice presidential debate, arguing that the rules were that the moderators would not fact-check, and claimed that Haitian immigrants in Springfield, Ohio should not be considered legal
JD Vance stated that he opposes abortion, even in cases of rape, and believes that the fetus has inherent value and should be protected.
JD Vance expressed support for Israel in the Gaza war, stating that it should end so Israel and Sunni states can counter Iran.
JD Vance stated that he opposes continued American military aid to Ukraine during the ongoing Russian invasion and prefers a negotiated peace.
Vance argued for higher tax rate on childless Americans in 2021 interview
JD Vance wrote that 'judges aren't allowed to control the executive's legitimate power' after multiple federal judges issued temporary rulings against various Trump administration actions

JD Vance declared 'ideological war' on Europe in his speech at the Munich Security Conference, stating that 'the threat from within' is his biggest concern for European security, rather than Russia or China
JD Vance told Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy that it's disrespectful to litigate the conflict in front of the American media and accused Zelenskyy of showing a 'propaganda tour' of Ukraine

JD Vance incorrectly claimed that Zelenskyy 'went to Pennsylvania and campaigned for the opposition in October' 2024, when in fact Zelenskyy visited a factory to thank workers producing ammunition for Ukraine

JD Vance warned that Greenland faced the 'encroachment of powerful countries' China and Russia 'as they expand their ambitions', while declaring in a 'message to Denmark' that 'you have not done a good job'

JD Vance lamented that the 'globalist economy' had caused the United States to 'borrow money from Chinese peasants to buy the things those Chinese peasants manufacture', and was criticized by China for his 'peasants' remarks
JD Vance made a comment referring to 'childless cat ladies', sparking widespread criticism
JD Vance defended his 'childless cat ladies' comment, calling it 'sarcastic'
JD Vance has repeatedly expressed a belief that childlessness is linked to sociopathy and that parents should have more voting power than non-parents.
JD Vance backtracked from his suggestion that parents should have more voting power than non-parents.
Vance bashed teachers union president for not having 'some of her own' children
JD Vance told Kamala Harris to 'go to hell' for criticism she did not give
Vance pushed false accusations of Haitians eating pets
Vance says false claim he spread against Haitian migrants may not be true but urges followers to keep posting 'cat memes'
JD Vance shares social media post about immigrants cooking pets in Dayton, city refutes it
Vance Sticks By Pet-Eating Claims and Says He's Willing to 'Create Stories'
JD Vance appeared at an event hosted by a hard-right Christian nationalist
JD Vance stated that Trump did not lose the 2020 election, saying 'not by the words I would use'
